title: Object Structured Field Offset (0x58)
description: Layout for triplet 0x58: structured-field offset triplet. Tlength and Tid (offsets 0 and 1) are omitted from this mapping.
notes: Offsets are relative to the triplet start. Tlength and Tid are not represented here.

elements.name: SFOff
elements.description: Structured field offset (UBIN, 4 bytes). Specifies the offset of the referenced structured field within the document.

elements.name: SFOffHi
elements.description: High-order bytes of the structured field offset (UBIN, 4 bytes). Optional; present when the triplet length is 10.
